examples: The dormouse is a shy, nocturnal creature.
Nocturnal animals sleep by day and hunt by night.
When there is a full moon, this nocturnal rodent is careful to stay in its burrow.
This underground, nocturnal world of tango offers the purest way for visitors to experience the dance.
The passage through the nocturnal mammals is said to reduce the acidity and bitterness of the beans.
